overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a cowboy character walking through a stormy night at a railway freight yard. The scene features dramatic lightning, heavy rainfall, and industrial wooden warehouses alongside train tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open railway yard with livestock warehouse

events.description: heavy rain begins to fall, transitioning from dry storm conditions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the train tracks through the stormy railway yard with lightning visible in the sky

entered.detail: large wooden industrial building with green trim and illuminated windows
metal railway tracks running parallel to the walking path
dark freight train car sitting on a side track

segments.scene_description: The character walks along railway tracks at night during an electrical storm with visible lightning. A large wooden livestock warehouse with green trim stands prominently to the left while a boxcar sits on tracks to the right. Street lamps cast pools of warm light as heavy rain begins to fall toward the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: freight station office area in heavy rain

agents.ego_description: walking through heavy rainfall toward a red freight station building with head slightly bowed

entered.detail: small red wooden building with illuminated Freight Station sign on the roof
tiny wooden shack with lit window near the tracks
weathered wooden picket fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through heavy driving rain, the character approaches and passes a small red freight station building with a glowing sign. The ground becomes muddy and reflective. A small guard booth stands to the right as the character continues past the station office.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered freight loading area under railway bridge

events.description: passes underneath a large metal railway bridge overpass into a covered area
exits the bridge cover into an open area illuminated by wall-mounted exterior lamps

agents.ego_description: walking under a bridge overpass and alongside long wooden freight warehouses

entered.detail: large metal railway bridge structure spanning across the yard
long wooden industrial building with large sliding doors and exterior lighting
raised wooden dock for loading freight onto trains

segments.scene_description: The character passes underneath a massive railway bridge, temporarily sheltering from the rain. Long wooden freight warehouses with glowing exterior wall lamps line the right side, featuring loading platforms and large sliding doors. The bridge structure looms overhead before the character continues into the open freight yard beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy railway freight yard that transitions from open tracks into the sheltered depths of an industrial bridge. It begins with the character walking along railway tracks under a flashing electrical storm, passing a large wooden livestock warehouse and a stationary boxcar illuminated by warm street lamps. As heavy driving rain begins to fall, the camera follows the character past a small red freight station with a glowing sign and a guard booth, while the ground transforms into a muddy, reflective surface. The scene then shifts as the character moves underneath a massive railway bridge for temporary shelter, passing long wooden warehouses with glowing wall lamps and loading platforms. Finally, the camera emerges from beneath the looming bridge structure to reveal the expansive open freight yard beyond.
